place: Lamai, Maret, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: New Three-Bedroom Garden Pool Villa in Lamai
blurb: A brand-new three-bedroom pool villa in Lamai, completed in 2025 to a modern tropical standard — single-storey living around an 8-metre private pool and a landscaped garden. Three en-suite bedrooms, an open kitchen with island, covered parking for two and a fully furnished, move-in-ready interior. ฿11,500,000.
detail:
A brand-new single-storey pool villa in a quiet residential part of Lamai, completed in the first quarter of 2025 and finished in a warm, modern tropical style. It sits on 467 m² of land with 296 m² of built space, arranged for easy one-level living and an effortless indoor-outdoor flow — close to Lamai's beach, restaurants and everyday amenities.

The heart of the home is an open-plan kitchen with a central island and breakfast bar, flowing into a bright living and dining room that opens through glass sliders to the pool terrace. Three double bedrooms each have their own en-suite bathroom, with a separate storage room and covered parking for two cars.

The private swimming pool runs eight metres along a sun terrace framed by lawn and young palms. Every room is air-conditioned and the villa is delivered fully furnished and ready to move into. The villa is held on a registered leasehold with approximately 28 years and 1 month remaining, running to August 2054. Lease terms, floor plan and inventory available on request.
